channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Passengers start to disembark cruise ship stricken by hantavirus - CBS News
item.description:
1. Passengers start to disembark cruise ship stricken by hantavirus  CBS News
  2. The country where lethal hantavirus cases are on the rise. Experts blame climate change  CNN

  4. Hantavirus: Current Situation  Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
  5. Mapped: The countries affected by the cruise ship Hantavirus outbreak that has killed three people  The Independent

item.title: Putin says he thinks Russia-Ukraine war is coming to an end - NBC News
item.description:
1. Putin says he thinks Russia-Ukraine war is coming to an end  NBC News

  3. Putin suggests Russia’s war on Ukraine ‘coming to an end’  Al Jazeera
  4. Putin says he believes Ukrainian conflict nearing end amid scaled-down Victory Day celebrations  CBS News
  5. Putin says Ukraine war 'heading to an end' despite ceasefire violations  France 24

item.title: Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation - AP News
item.description:
1. Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation  AP News

item.title: Car bombing and shootout kills 14 Pakistani police officers - Reuters
item.description:

item.title: Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade  Al Jazeera

item.title: Fragile Iran ceasefire appears to hold as Iran warns the U.S. against attacks on its oil tankers and other ships - PBS
item.description:
1. Fragile Iran ceasefire appears to hold as Iran warns the U.S. against attacks on its oil tankers and other ships  PBS

  4. Iran War Live News Updates: Iran Publicly Details Supreme Leader’s Injuries for First Time  WSJ

item.title: Hungary’s New PM Magyar Demands President Quit in Showdown - Bloomberg.com
item.description:

item.title: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces calls to resign after disastrous local elections - CBS News

item.title: Tanker crosses Strait of Hormuz as US waits for Iran's response to peace proposal - Yahoo News UK

item.title: Australian far-right party wins first lower house seat - DW.com
item.description:

item.title: Settlers force Palestinians to exhume body of relative buried near West Bank settlement - The Times of Israel
item.description:

  4. Israeli Settlers in the West Bank Refuse to Let Dead Palestinians Rest in Peace  Haaretz

item.title: UK deploys warship to Middle East with eye on potential Hormuz mission - Reuters
item.description:
1. UK deploys warship to Middle East with eye on potential Hormuz mission  Reuters

  5. UK Re-deploys Destroyer Dragon to Middle East for Potential Hormuz Mission  navalnews.com
